_authority.purpose: Founder-owned financial priority order for the autonomous product-build loop. The never-stop factory builds eligible product work in this order (highest financial priority first). This is a BUSINESS decision — edit `priority` to change what the system builds first.

rules.financial_first: `priority` is an ordered list of product_ids by financial priority, highest first. The loop builds listed products before unlisted ones.
rules.maturity_fallback: Products NOT in `priority` are ranked after listed ones by definition maturity — a product with a larger documented backlog / more fleshed-out PRODUCT_HOME builds before a thinner one.
rules.skip_undefined: Products with no documented backlog AND no BUILD_QUEUE.json are skipped entirely until the founder adds ideas/features (existing loop behavior — never fabricated work).
rules.editable: Adam edits this list anytime. Adding a product_id here promotes it; removing it drops it back to maturity-based ordering.

notes: 2026-07-10: Founder — keep building vision in any order; do not stop. Expanded priority so never-stop plans queues for products with documented backlog (tc-service, builderos, …) after MarketingOS Layer B closed. marketingos/lifeos first for vision continuity.
2026-07-09: limitlessos (Go Vegas) was #1 — nearest live revenue loop. site-builder + marketingos Phase1/2/intel queues complete.
Seeded 2026-07-06 with site-builder first per founder direction.
